What We Do

Our Services

🚘
Driveways

Exposed aggregate, plain or coloured concrete driveways that add instant kerb appeal and last decades.

🛀
Pool Surrounds

Slip-resistant, beautiful pool surrounds in exposed aggregate, honed or smooth finishes.

🪟
Stairs & Steps

Concrete staircases and steps built to code — solid, safe and finished to a high standard.

🛻
Paths & Walkways

Custom shaped paths, side access walkways and pedestrian areas done with precision and care.

🏗
Commercial Work

Industrial paths, warehouse floors and commercial slab work for contractors and builders.

✨
Exposed Aggregate

Premium exposed aggregate finishes — stone-washed texture that looks incredible and stays tough.

🧱
Retaining Walls

Solid concrete retaining walls built to spec — precision poured and perfectly levelled for lasting structural integrity.

▤
Concrete Slabs

House pads, shed slabs, extension slabs and more — poured flat, level and within tight tolerances every time.

Recent Work

Our Portfolio

Why Choose Us

Not Just Another
Concreter

Plenty of concreters will take your money and disappear. Jake Blackler built Mixed Concrete Services on the opposite — showing up when he says, quoting what he charges, and finishing the job to a standard he's proud to put his name on.

With 37 verified 5-star Facebook reviews and a 98% recommendation rate, the results speak louder than any sales pitch. From a small path to a large commercial pour, every job gets the same care.

@mixed_concrete_services Mixed Concrete Services
✓
Shows Up On Time
Jake is on site when he says he will be. No chasing, no excuses — your project starts on schedule.
✓
Quotes What He Charges
The price you're quoted is the price you pay. Transparent from day one, no nasty surprises at the end.
✓
Site Left Clean Every Day
Multiple clients specifically mention this — the site is cleaned up properly after each day's work.
✓
Tight Tolerances, Real Skill
Slabs poured within 3mm tolerance. The kind of precision that builders and developers rely on.
✓
Big or Small, He Pours It All
From a small footpath to a large development pour — same standard, same attention to detail.

Facebook Review · 2021
★★★★★

"Jake's services was excellent! Highly recommend. His work is very neat and is exactly what we asked for! He was very professional, being on-time and ensuring the site was left clean! Hayley Estelle
Facebook Review · December 2020
★★★★★

"Brilliant! They came, they laid, they cleaned. In a blink of an eye job was done in a timely manner with great situational awareness of their surroundings (they didn't kill the garden). I would recommend M.C.S. to anyone that needs concrete. Ours is Exposed Aggregate. Thank you guys!"

"Jake kindly fit our job in before Xmas. We needed some concreting done at the front of our house and it needed to match existing concrete already there.
